rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And Produce Documents Specified In The Deposition Notice; And For Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions.
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Attorney Fees And Costs; Mem. Of Pts. & Auth.
rulings.Rulings: Motion to Expunge Lis Pendens Granted. Mr. Lieberman's request for attorney fees is granted subject to Mr. Lieberman filing a declaration itemizing fees and costs on or before 5/3/12. Ms. Williams may file objections to the declaration on or before 5/10/12 on which date the issue of attorney fees will be deemed submitted.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF CONSERVATOR OF PERSON AND ESTATE
